cards.flavor_text: [i]The only human living in the Scarlet Devil Mansion, the maid with the pocketwatch is its last and fiercest line of defense.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]“Quit teasing me! I'll deep-freeze you with some English beef!!”[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]With the scarlet mist blocking out the sun, nocturnal youkai had free reign to thrive during the day as well.[/i]

—Hieda no Akyuu, [/i]The Gensokyo Chronicle[i][/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]Gensokyo has no borders in the traditional sense. At its fringes you keep traveling forever, only to find you've gone nowhere at all.[/i]

Enchant creature

cards.flavor_text: [i]To ensure lunarian prosperity, the princess of that ancient land was sealed into the altar- her mind bent to lunar will, to serve as a living filter for the moon's data stream.[/i]

Flash

cards.flavor_text: [i]Though the residents of the Sanctuary chafe at society and seek isolation, they chose her as their king because she leaves them alone and keeps intruders out of their territories.[/i]

[i]Logical Wall[/i] — {2}{U}, {T}: Surveil 1, then draw a card. [i](To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Long ago, an ancient fashioned a guardian spirit to keep whatever had been sealed within the altar from getting out. Nothing has ever tried, so she's gotten quite bored and preoccupied with riddles.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Stagnation held Gensokyo. The vibrant land so known for chaos passed its days in pure routine, each day playing out the same as the last, and few could even perceive it.[/i]

cards.rules_text:

If it's your turn, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Those who inhabit the Sanctuary reject all who try to change their lifestyles. In an irony, this allowed it to resist Gensokyo's stagnation, leaving it the only place continuing to change from day to day.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]The sea that stretched out before my eyes is devoid of life... Yes, this sea bears not a single impurity, save one thing: the place where it reflects that blue planet.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]The altar deep within the Sanctuary concentrated all the data produced by human minds, written or coded or spoken or prayed, to filter into purified faith. As the data flow surged, the altar's lone inhabitant's sense of reality faltered.[/i]

cards.rules_text:

cards.flavor_text: [i]Shizuha Aki, the goddess of autumn leaves, works tirelessly every year to ensure the leaves change color by painting every last one by hand.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
[i]Landfall[/i] — If a land entered the battlefield under your control this turn, draw a card.

Reach
[i]Divine Virtues of the Wind God[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn.
You may play land cards from your graveyard.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The outside world had no more need for gods, but the gods had need for faith. In Gensokyo she found a hidden world where gods were still revered, and sought to stand at its peak.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Reach
[i]Kappa's Pororoca[/i] — When Nitori enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The kappa of the ravine are shy by nature. Although they interact with humans rarely, the kappa watch them often via stealth, and like to think they're on good terms with each other.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
[i]Gray Thaumaturgy[/i] — Whenever Sanae deals combat damage to an opponent, reveal the top card of your library. Put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a land. Otherwise, you may cast that card and it costs {2} less to cast.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Such a strange place, this fantasy “Gensokyo”, where a living god is simply a normal girl.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flash
Flying
When Aya enters, choose one —
• Tap target creature.
• Untap target creature.
• Draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“We received an intruder alert, and for some reason they called me onto the job...”[/i]

cards.rules_text:

cards.flavor_text: [i]The native god of the Moriya shrine, she ruled over her lands until centuries ago when Kanako, one of the gods of the nascent Japanese empire, defeated her in battle and claimed the shrine for her own.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Trample
[i]Exiled Doll[/i] — When Hina enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. If you controlled it, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Though she is shunned for the evil aura of misfortune that clings to her, Hina is a benevolent goddess who carries the misfortunes of others upon herself to carry them away where they can hurt nobody else.[/i]

cards.rules_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Throughout all nature, from the mightiest mountain to the smallest fallen leaf, there is divinity. Within the stones, the trees, the beasts, the winds, in everything there live gods both great and small.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
This creature can't be blocked by legendary creatures.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The tengu of the mountain allow no outsiders in their borders. The moment you step upon the mountain you are already being watched, waiting for you to take one step too far.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Untap target creature. It gets +3/+3 and gains reach until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]As the new shrine on the mountaintop grew in influence, its shrine maiden ordered Reimu to shut down the waning Hakurei shrine and turn it over to them. She declined, with extreme prejudice.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature. If a tapped creature was dealt damage this way, you gain 3 life.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The inhabitants of the Youkai Mountain don't like outsiders. They didn't like it when outsiders appeared on the mountaintop, and they didn't like it when more outsiders showed up to fight them.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn.
Draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Before anyone knew it, a new shinto shrine appeared on the mountain, passed in from the Outside World. Before anything could be done about it, its gods were already being worshipped.[/i]

cards.flavor_text:
[i]“A large number of kappa inhabit the ravine and have created their own society there. In general, they are very dextrous and excel at making tools. It appears that their technological level is beyond the understanding of human's.”
—Hieda no Akyuu, [/i]The Gensokyo Chronicle[i][/i]
cards.notes:
!tapped

!tag HM
!tag Spinoff
!tag Fighter
!tag Chronicle

When you think of waterfalls, there are two images: the powerful, vast waterfall and the meek, trickling one. But this time, I opted for the image of the former... An autumn waterfall. I think the thing waterfalls convey the most is autumn.

When you cast this spell, exile target permanent.
Whenever Junko attacks, defending player chooses and exiles a creature they control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Chang'e. Are you watching?”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
[i]Violent Land that Mothers All[/i] — At the beginning of combat on each player's turn, goad target creature that player controls. [i](Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)[/i]
Goaded creatures you control get +3/+3.

[i]({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)[/i]
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
cards.flavor_text: [i]It looks like space, but it's actually the mental world. So it is an ‘all just a dream' twist, in a sense. The fairies and phantoms wandering around are the dreams of said creatures in reality. It's mischievous of them to spread barrages of danmaku even in dreams.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
[i]({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)[/i]
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“They are especially merciless towards trespassers, and will chase them away with all their might no matter who they may be. Because of this, the actual state of affairs on the mountain is mostly a mystery.”
— Hieda no Akyuu, [/i]The Gensokyo Chronicle[i][/i]
cards.notes:
!tapped

!tag MoF
!tag Music
!tag Chronicle

In the village it's said that the mountain's smoke isn't real smoke, but rather fumes that spew from factories run by the tengu and the kappa... However, the human that lived in the bamboo forest knew.

cards.rules_text:
Flying
At the beginning of combat on your turn, until end of turn, up to one target creature you control gets +2/+1 and gains “When this creature dies, draw a card.” Sacrifice that creature at end of combat.
cards.flavor_text: [i]To save the capital from contamination, she thrust its inhabitants into the dream world, and launched an assault to purify Gensokyo into a new home.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.
[i]September Pumpkin[/i] — Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you gain 1 life and create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token.

Seiran enters tapped.
[i]The Rabbit has Landed[/i] — When Seiran enters, create two tapped 1/1 white Rabbit creature tokens.
cards.flavor_text: [i]A breach opened through rumor, superstition, and dream, and the forces of the Moon pushed through to scour the surface clean of all life.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Menace
When Hecatia enters, choose one —
• Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

• Amass Faeries 2. [i](Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.)[/i]

Flying
[i]Hell Eclipse[/i] — Whenever you gain life or an opponent loses life, amass Faeries 1. This ability triggers only twice each turn. [i](Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Hey, fairies, let's crank up the speed! It's lunatic time!! Welcome to a world of madness!”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Exile target creature.
• Exile target planeswalker.
• Exile target player's graveyard.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Hou Yi murdered Junko's son and Hecatia's sun. Though his bones now lie rotting in the earth, their vengeance will not be complete until his immortal widow lies buried with him.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Affinity for legendary permanents [i](This spell costs {1} less to cast for each legendary permanent you control.)[/i]
Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Junko's humanity died along with her son.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Look at target opponent's hand and choose a nonland permanent card from it. That player exiles that card. You lose 2 life.
cards.flavor_text: [i]No hesitation. No regret. No mercy.[/i]

cards.rules_text: You and permanents you control have ward {2}. [i](Whenever you or a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Beyond life. Beyond death. Beyond reproach.[/i]
cards.artist: 瞑丸 イヌチヨ/Meimaru Inuchiyo

cards.rules_text: Return target creature card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text:

“No... let's do this fairly and battle in turns.”

cards.rules_text:
Kicker—Sacrifice a non-Rabbit token. [i](You may sacrifice a non-Rabbit token in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.)[/i]
Create two 1/1 white Rabbit creature tokens. If this spell was kicked, create four instead.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The Earth Recon Unit “Eagle Ravi” had the unenviable and underpaid job of securing a sterile landing site for the Lunar forces.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying, deathtouch
When this creature dies, you gain 1 life.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The Lunarians abhor ‘kegare', the defilement borne by blood, disease, and rot. To escape it, they became pure beings free of life and death. So to torment them Hecatia unleashed Hell's fairies onto the moon, embodiments of life and all its impurities.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
Sacrifice this enchantment: When target creature dies this turn, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]For consuming the elixir gifted to her husband, Chang'e became the moon's eternal prisoner.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]To escape Junko's assault, the Lunarians were hidden within a dream of Kaian, unaware anything was even happening. Here, the Goddess of Hell and the Ruler of Dreams whirled around one another, vultures over their fates.[/i]
